meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve can't collaborate (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't collaborate. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Collaborate
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement seamless user onboarding to overcome collaboration friction. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Collaboration stalls when users lack clear guidance. By implementing an automated, interactive user onboarding flow, you eliminate friction, reduce support tickets, and shorten the time-to-value for your clients. This tutorial leverages Antigravity and Claude Code to scaffold professional, high-conversion onboarding experiences in minutes, not days.
content.intro:
You’ve built the feature, but your client’s users are stuck. They don't know where to click, they don't understand the value, and the feedback loop is dead. The 'can't collaborate' wall isn't a technical bug—it's a communication gap that kills project momentum and your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer.

It’s time to stop explaining your app via endless Loom videos and start building self-service onboarding. By embedding contextual, step-by-step guidance directly into your UI, you transform confused users into power users, ensuring your code gets used, appreciated, and paid for.

steps.title: Define the Onboarding Journey
steps.description: Identify the 'Aha!' moment. Map out the 3-5 critical steps a new user must take to experience the value of your collaborative tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user flow schema for a collaborative task management app that highlights the top 3 features for first-time users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a new file named onboarding_flow.json with the defined steps'.

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding Component
steps.description: Build a modular, reusable onboarding component that overlays the UI to guide users through the collaborative interface.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React-based onboarding tooltip component that accepts a target element ID and a message string.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create src/components/OnboardingTooltip.tsx using Tailwind CSS'.

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding state is saved to the backend so users don't see the same tips twice.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase-compatible function to track completed onboarding steps per user_id.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add a user_onboarding table to the database schema'.

steps.title: Contextual Trigger Logic
steps.description: Trigger the onboarding flow only when the user first enters the collaborative workspace.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a hook that detects if a user has completed the onboarding flow and triggers the first tooltip if not.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate useOnboarding hook and integrate it into the dashboard component'.

steps.title: Final QA and Edge-Case Handling
steps.description: Test the flow to ensure users can skip or exit the onboarding without breaking the collaborative environment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the onboarding component to verify skip and completion states.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Run tests/onboarding.test.ts to verify the component logic'.

pro_tips: Use 'progressive disclosure': Don't explain the whole app; only explain the next step the user needs to take.
Always include a 'Skip' button. Forcing onboarding on power users will drive them away instantly.
Use analytics to track where users drop off in your onboarding flow; that is exactly where your UI is failing.
Keep copy brief. If a tooltip takes more than 10 seconds to read, you are teaching, not onboarding.
Use visual cues like pulsing rings on buttons to guide eyes without needing extra descriptive text.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a usability test with a non-technical colleague, and iterate based on their confusion points.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with user retention and start shipping interfaces that teach themselves. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
